_comment: content_coming_soon_v1 extension: content_status + release_at flow through to ItemView per Phase 0c. Resolved behavior is DEFAULT (no recipes set). Layer plan is unchanged ([content, chrome]) — per spec, coming_soon items still render their cover + metadata; only the /media/play call returns 403 until release. Boundary UX (skipping coming_soon items from auto-advance) is Phase 0c.4+ polish; this fixture validates the schema parse only.
